## Architecture

This page explains the overall architecture of `@mui/internal-docs-infra`, including data flows, key design decisions, and how the various pieces fit together.

<details>

<summary>Outline</summary>

- Sections:
  - Overview
  - Data Flows
    - Code Demos Pipeline
    - Type Documentation Pipeline
      - Build-time path (precomputed)
      - Runtime path (from existing types.md)
    - Search Pipeline
  - The Factory Pattern
  - Worker Thread Architecture
  - Module Organization
  - Key Design Decisions
    - Why HAST?
    - Why webpack loaders over runtime processing?
    - Why the factory pattern?
  - Performance Characteristics
  - Related Documentation

</details>

## Contributing

This guide covers how to set up your development environment and contribute to `@mui/internal-docs-infra`.

<details>

<summary>Outline</summary>

- Sections:
  - Getting Started
    - Prerequisites
    - Setup
    - Development Commands
  - Development Workflow
    - 1\. Write tests first
    - 2\. Write documentation
    - 3\. Implement the feature
    - 4\. Validate
  - Project Structure
  - Code Conventions
    - Naming
    - File Organization
    - Code Style
  - Testing Guidelines
    - Unit Tests
    - Integration Tests
  - Adding a New Feature
    - New Function
    - New Component
    - New webpack Loader
  - File Conventions
  - Workspace Commands
  - Versioning
  - Getting Help

</details>
